name: PowerShell
description: Adversaries may abuse PowerShell commands and scripts for execution.

name: DNS
description: Adversaries may use DNS traffic as a channel for command and control or exfiltration.

name: SMB/Windows Admin Shares
description: Adversaries may use SMB to interact with file shares, allowing remote access to systems using valid accounts.

name: Scheduled Task
description: Adversaries may abuse the Windows Task Scheduler to perform task scheduling for initial or recurring execution.

name: Kerberoasting
description: Adversaries may abuse Kerberos ticket-granting service requests to obtain crackable service account credentials.

name: Malicious File
description: Adversaries may rely on a user opening a malicious file to gain code execution.

name: Local Data Staging
description: Adversaries may stage collected data in a central location prior to exfiltration.
